/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/brick.cpp.o -o main  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.3.0.2
